value: v1.11.0 quality release. Tracked via GitHub milestone v1.11.0 (https://github.com/seabearDEV/codexCLI/milestone/1). All four scoped items DONE: (1) Tier 1 doc fixes from PR #58 review, merged in 3077055; (2) withFileLock fail-closed in production with CODEX_DISABLE_LOCKING=1 opt-out for tests + lockless-fallback test coverage + defensive shallow-cache audit (#61, PR #66 merged 2026-04-08, commit 5b41b4b); (3) Short-flag namespace audit + --raw removal (#62, PR #65 merged 2026-04-08, commit 1c73e49) — removed --raw/-r entirely, added -p to --plain on get/context, added -j to stats --json, moved stats/audit --detailed from -d to -D; (4) CODEX_DATA_DIR polish (#63, PR #64 merged 2026-04-08, commit 74c1508) — README env-var section, absolute-path validation, ccli info provenance annotation, clearDataDirectoryCache() export, W_OK|X_OK writability check (Copilot review fix). Release is feature-complete; awaiting cut. Release prep: CHANGELOG cleanup pending (duplicate sections merged), package.json version bump pending, release-checklist.md added at docs/release-checklist.md. Out of scope for v1.11: hand-edit drift detection (defer to v1.12+), --values long-flag clash on get vs find (defer), full cross-command short-flag aesthetic cleanup (defer).
